title: Model Runtime
subtitle: Manage provider sources, route groups, and configured models in one place.

hints.token: Leave empty to keep the stored credential unchanged.
hints.tokenConfigured: A credential is already stored for this provider.
hints.credentialClearOnSave: The stored credential will be cleared when you save.
hints.credentialWillBeCleared: This source does not use a token. Saving will clear the stored credential.
hints.capabilityType: Capability type follows the active model-runtime tab and controls model / route filtering.
hints.idEditable: Set the stable ID directly while creating a new provider.
hints.idLockedForExisting: Renaming existing provider IDs is not available in WebUI yet.
hints.emptySelection: Select a provider or route from the left sidebar to begin.
hints.selectProviderSource: Start from a provider source before filling the editor so you do not enter values that cannot be saved.
hints.contextWindowAuto: Context window is detected automatically. Current value: {value}
hints.pricePerUnit: Unit: {currency} / {unit}. Leave empty to keep it unset.
hints.thinking: Only shown when supported by the selected source.
hints.filters: Only shown when supported by the selected source.
hints.defaultParamsJson: Add defaultParams fields that are not controlled above; proxy, requestHeaders, thinking, filters, and apiVersion are generated from the form.
hints.defaultParamsPreview: Preview of the defaultParams payload that will be saved with the provider.
hints.noModelMatches: No models match the current search.
hints.noConfiguredModels: There are no configured models for this tab yet.
hints.noRouteModels: There are no models in this domain that can be added to the route yet.
hints.modelIdPicker: You can still type directly, or pick a route ID / model ID from the dialog.
hints.modelIdPickerEmpty: There are no route IDs or model IDs available yet.
hints.providerSourcePicker: Selecting a provider source fills the matching default URL and supported options.
hints.providerSourcePickerEmpty: There are no provider sources available.
hints.providerSourcePickerNoMatches: No matching provider sources were found.

labels.setupSummaryReady: Provider is ready for model routing.
labels.setupSummarySave: Save the provider before testing it.
labels.setupSummaryProbe: Provider saved. Connection test is pending.
labels.setupSummaryCatalog: Fetch the model catalog after testing.

messages.loadFailed: Failed to load model runtime data
messages.confirmProviderSourceChange: Switching to {source} will reset incompatible advanced fields. Continue?
messages.runtimeDisabled: The current config does not enable model runtime and has no Agent bot that requires it. You can still maintain provider, model, and route data here, but the main process will not use it.
messages.runtimeRestartRequired: The current config will enable model runtime, but the running process has not mounted it yet. Restart the backend to apply it.
messages.invalidDefaultParamsJson: Extra defaultParams must be a JSON object
messages.invalidPrice: Price must be a number greater than or equal to 0
